_comment: Example route. Replace the waypoints with ones you capture in-game: walk the speedrun route, press the capture_waypoint hotkey (default F8) at each point, then Save Route from the menu. Coordinates are UE4 world units (cm). mode is 'teleport' (instant) or 'walk' (glide at move_speed). tolerance is arrival radius in cm; wait_ms pauses after reaching the point.
name: Hello Neighbor 1.1.6 - Act 1 (example)
